message.content:
@startuml

actor User as user_top
actor User as user_bottom
database "Datastore" as datastore_top
database "Datastore" as datastore_bottom

box "Application Layer" #LightGray
participant "«@Controller»\nSubscriptionController" as SC
end box

box "Domain Model Layer" #LightGray
participant "«@Bean»\nSubscriptionServiceImpl" as SSI
end box

box "Infrastructure Layer" #LightGray
participant "«@Bean»\nJpaSubscriptionRepository" as JSR
participant "«@Repository»\nSubscriptionPersistenceJpaRepository" as SPJR
end box

user_top -> SC : 
hnote over SC, SSI : via SubscriptionService
SC -> SSI :
hnote over JSR : via SubscriptionRepository
SSI -> JSR :
hnote over SPJR : via Spring data repository
JSR -> SPJR :
SPJR -> datastore_top :
SPJR <-- datastore_top :
JSR <-- SPJR :
SSI <-- JSR :
SC <-- SSI :
user_top <-- SC :

== ==

user_bottom <- SC
note over SC : «@Controller»\nSubscriptionController
note over SSI : «@Bean»\nSubscriptionServiceImpl
note over JSR : «@Bean»\nJpaSubscriptionRepository
note over SPJR : «@Repository»\nSubscriptionPersistenceJpaRepository

@enduml
